questions.q: Which Article of the Indian Constitution abolishes untouchability?
questions.explanation: Article 17 abolishes untouchability and forbids its practice in any form.

questions.q: The Right to Education (RTE) Act, 2009 is related to which Fundamental Right?
options: Right to Life and Personal Liberty
questions.explanation: Article 21A (inserted by 86th Amendment) mandates free and compulsory education and is part of Right to Life.

questions.q: Which of the following Fundamental Rights cannot be suspended even during National Emergency?
questions.explanation: Articles 20 and 21 cannot be suspended even during National Emergency under Article 359.

questions.q: Writs can be issued by the Supreme Court under which Article?
questions.explanation: Article 32 empowers the Supreme Court to issue writs for enforcement of Fundamental Rights. Article 226 is for High Courts.

questions.q: Which Article prohibits traffic in human beings and forced labour?
questions.explanation: Article 23 prohibits traffic in human beings, begar and other forms of forced labour.
